Class Siunta

java.lang.Object
lt.viko.eif.dsimanavicius.task1.Siunta
public class Siunta extends Object
Represents a shipment with a list of package items.
Author:
Dominykas

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Siunta()
    Default constructor required by JAXB.
    Siunta(int shipmentId, String sender, String origin, String destination, float totalWeight, boolean delivered, String priority, List<SiuntaItem> packageItems)
    Creates a shipment with all fields.

  • Constructor Details

    • Siunta

      public Siunta()
      Default constructor required by JAXB.

    • Siunta

      public Siunta(int shipmentId, String sender, String origin, String destination, float totalWeight, boolean delivered, String priority, List<SiuntaItem> packageItems)
      Creates a shipment with all fields.
      Parameters:
      shipmentId - unique shipment ID
      sender - sender name
      origin - origin city
      destination - destination city
      totalWeight - total weight in kg
      delivered - delivery status
      priority - priority level
      packageItems - list of packages
